conditions.condition: Install or restore scipy/matplotlib, run the real optimizer path, and reconfirm the sign contract on real theta outputs before any confirmatory NSFC result is trusted.

Derive and confirm the team x scenario x family membership map from outcome-free raw replay/session metadata, such as caseId/session/task structural fields, before any outcome read, residualization, or model fitting. Stop if the map is available only in score/rank or score-joined files.

Do not use top-five README files, team README files, top5_selection_summary.csv, top5_scenario_scores.csv, validation_summary.csv, score_team_coverage.csv, Gate -1 process/review directories, official scores/ranks, or predictor-outcome results to derive the pre-outcome scenario map.

scenario_membership_source_verdict.freeze_used_source: Team folds use session manifest structure; scenario/family folds use canonical plan labels and carry an explicit Phase 4 blocker requiring outcome-free cell membership derivation.
outcome_free_structural_evidence_availab: raw replay/session logs expose score/rank-free caseId/taskId/recordId/caseName fields
scenario_membership_source_verdict.phase4_required_action: Create or confirm a score-free team x scenario x family mapping before outcome access; block if only score-joined tables provide labels.

recommended_next_codex_task: Phase 4 directional IPV + baseline + confirmatory + negative controls
